meaning: n.流木,浮木,(社会变动所产生的)无用的人
examples: There are only 25 inscriptions, some quite long, and all written on driftwood.
Tyler was pulling driftwood logs out of the surf and dragging them up the beach.
Now the driftwood hut is a relic of a bygone age, in a wilderness of breathtaking beauty.
He constructed goals from driftwood and fishing nets he found on the beach.
Alongside BC brews from Phillips and Driftwood, frighteningly strong Quebec beers jostle with unfiltered Belgian libations and US favourites from Deschutes and Brooklyn.
